profile_id.description: Stable user-chosen profile identifier (unique per harness).

harness_id.description: Harness family this profile belongs to.

display_name.description: Human label shown wherever the profile appears.

credential_kind.description: Credential transport a profile isolates: a scoped vendor config-dir login, a stored OAuth token, or a stored API key.

isolation_locator.description: Canonical absolute config-dir path for config_dir_login profiles; null for secret-ref kinds.

secret_ref.description: Namespaced secret-store name (e.g. claude_oauth:work) for oauth_token/api_key profiles; null for config_dir_login.

created_at.description: When the profile was registered; null for hand-written config entries.

CredentialProfile.description: Durable non-secret registry entry for one credential identity of one harness; secret material lives in the vendor dir or the secret store, never here.
